title: MendingRemover
description: MendingRemover is a minimalist utility mod for Minecraft that completely removes the Mending enchantment from the game.
body:
# 🔧 MendingRemover - Mod

No More Infinite Gear

MendingRemover is a minimalist utility mod for Minecraft that completely removes the Mending enchantment from the game.

![MendingRemover-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa14c5272a3b49c057802fed57887fd2cedfb47_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PF0GvzjJAp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Whether you’re aiming for more meaningful gear progression, challenging survival mechanics, or simply tired of tools lasting forever, this mod helps bring durability management back into focus.

## 🧱 What it does:
- Mending no longer appears on enchanted books or loot.
- Mending cannot be obtained via enchanting tables, trades, or anvils.
- Existing Mending items in worlds will have the enchantment stripped on load.
- **New:** Config option to allow or disable Mending in chest loot
  - When enabled, Mending becomes a rare exploration reward
  - Villagers will still not trade Mending

A perfect companion for survival-focused, hardcore, or progression-based modpacks where resource management matters again.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
